reasoning: The control CP-6 (1) focuses on ensuring that backup storage is separated from the primary site to protect against data loss. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that etcd, which stores cluster state, is backed up properly and that these backups are stored separately from the primary cluster infrastructure. Additionally, ensuring that pod data and configurations are backed up and stored separately aligns with this control. While Kubernetes does not inherently manage physical separation of storage, configuring backup policies and ensuring logical separation can be achieved through proper backup configurations.
title: Alternate Storage Site | Separation from Primary Site
